query: best cloud hosting for side projects
summary: For side projects, developers have shifted away from Heroku following Salesforce's 2026 decision to halt new feature development. The main contenders are DigitalOcean App Platform (a Heroku alternative built on the same buildpack model), AWS (full infrastructure control but steeper learning curve), and platforms like Northflank (which offer Heroku-like simplicity with your own cloud account). DigitalOcean stands out for side projects due to low entry cost, managed infrastructure, and 2-5x better compute pricing than Heroku.

products.name: DigitalOcean App Platform
products.pricing: Free tier ($0/month), Paid tier starts at $5/month
products.freeTier: Up to 3 static sites, 1GiB data transfer per app, automatic HTTPS, global CDN, DDoS mitigation, unlimited team members, deployment from GitHub/GitLab
keyFeatures: Support for Node.js, Python, Java, Go, PHP, static sites
products.bestFor: Developers migrating from Heroku, side projects needing simplicity with cost-effectiveness, teams without DevOps expertise
products.verdict: Strongest Heroku replacement for side projects—combines PaaS simplicity with better pricing and an active development roadmap.

products.name: Heroku
products.pricing: Eco $5/month, Basic $7/month per dyno, Standard $25-50/month per dyno, Performance $250-500/month per dyno
keyFeatures: Support for Node.js, Ruby, Java, Python, Go, .NET, Scala
products.bestFor: Teams prioritizing simplicity and willing to pay for convenience; legacy projects already on Heroku
products.verdict: No longer recommended for new projects—entering 'sustaining engineering' mode with no new features, and pricing is 2-5x higher than DigitalOcean for equivalent compute.

products.name: AWS
products.pricing: Pay-as-you-go; t3.micro ~$7.50/month, t3.medium ~$30/month; Reserved Instances save up to 72%, Spot Instances up to 90%
products.freeTier: 12 months free for new accounts (limited service usage)
keyFeatures: 240+ cloud services (EC2, RDS, Lambda, ECS, EKS)
Full GPU access (H100, A100, V100) for custom ML training
products.bestFor: Teams with DevOps expertise, projects requiring custom infrastructure, high-traffic applications, AI/ML workloads with GPU needs
products.verdict: Powerful but complex for side projects—requires significant DevOps knowledge and architecture decisions; lowest cost at scale but steepest learning curve.

products.name: Northflank
products.freeTier: Transparent pricing with deployment in your own cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure) account
keyFeatures: Deploy in your own AWS/GCP/Azure account for provider pricing
products.bestFor: Developers seeking Heroku simplicity with AWS cost efficiency; projects needing GPU access without DevOps overhead
products.verdict: Middle-ground solution that bridges Heroku's simplicity and AWS's flexibility, though less established than the major alternatives.

recommendation: For side projects, use DigitalOcean App Platform: it's the best Heroku replacement with $0-5/month entry cost, zero DevOps required, and transparent pricing. If your side project needs GPU-accelerated ML, Northflank offers simplicity with custom infrastructure. Avoid Heroku unless you're maintaining existing projects. Only choose AWS if your side project will scale significantly and you have DevOps expertise or time to learn.
